'''Tromes''' were small [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] beings found on the Forest Moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. They were characterized by their small size, high voices, and large beards. Despite their small size, their favorite sport was wrestling; they had wrestling tournaments annually.

==Behind the scenes==
Tromes bear some resemblance to the [[Wikipedia:Snow White and the Seven Dwarves|Seven Dwarves]].
